problems.group: 1. Fill in the table and plot the points.
problems.display: Calculate y values for y = x + 2, fill the table, and plot the points (see workbook p. 87)

problems.group: 2. Fill in the table and plot the points.
problems.display: Calculate y values for y = 8 − x, fill the table, and plot the points (see workbook p. 87)

problems.group: 3. Fill in the table and plot the points.
problems.display: Calculate y values for y = 2x − 1, fill the table, and plot the points (see workbook p. 87)

problems.label: 4a
problems.display: A car travels at 80 km/h. Fill in the distance table (see workbook p. 88)

problems.label: 4b
problems.display: Plot the car's distance points on the coordinate grid (see workbook p. 88)

problems.label: 4c
problems.display: Write an equation relating t and d for the car travelling at 80 km/h.

problems.label: 4d
problems.display: Which is the independent variable, t or d?

problems.label: 5a
problems.group: 5. Larry gets 1 litre of water per 3 seconds.
problems.display: Larry gets 1 litre of water per 3 seconds. Fill in the volume table (see workbook p. 88)

problems.label: 5b
problems.display: Plot the water volume points on the coordinate grid (see workbook p. 88)

problems.label: 5c
problems.display: Write an equation relating t (seconds) and V (litres) for the water faucet.

problems.label: 5d
problems.display: Which is the independent variable, t or V?

problems.label: 6a
problems.display: Xavier and Yvonne share 12 candies. Fill in the table using the graph (see workbook p. 88)

problems.label: 6b
problems.display: Write an equation relating X (Xavier's candy) and Y (Yvonne's candy).

problems.label: 6c
problems.display: Which is the independent variable, X or Y? (for Xavier and Yvonne's candy)

problems.label: 7a
problems.group: 7. Maximum safe heart rate: H = 220 − A.
problems.display: Calculate the max safe heart rate H = 220 − A for ages 5 to 60 (every 5 years). Fill the table (see workbook p. 89).

problems.label: 7b
problems.display: Plot the heart rate points on the coordinate grid (see workbook p. 89)

problems.label: 7c
problems.display: For H = 220 − A, which is the dependent variable: H or A?
